hook.summary: A female influencer introduces the game with a split-screen showing gameplay.
hook.visual_action: Split-screen layout with a blonde woman playing on a phone at the top and monster-catching gameplay at the bottom.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Esse jogo é o Amikin Village e é muito divertido. Você coleciona Amikins

scene_flow: Influencer introduces Amikin Village with a split-screen showing gameplay.
Gameplay shows a character and a companion fighting a large deer creature in a field.
Influencer explains the core loop of collecting Amikins and building a village.
Influencer expresses her addiction to the game while combat gameplay continues.
audience_proxy: Mobile gamers who enjoy creature-collection and base-building games, likely fans of titles like Palworld or Pokemon.
